data.name: Common_Error
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

data.name: Issue_Unavailable
data.value: That issue isn't available — it may have been removed, or you don't have access to it.

data.name: CookieBanner_Text
data.value: This site uses essential cookies required for authentication and security. No tracking or analytics cookies are used.

data.name: Login_SignInFailed
data.value: Sign-in failed. This can happen if you took too long or your browser blocked cookies. Please try again.

data.name: AccessDenied_Description
data.value: You do not have permission to access this page.

data.name: Error_TryAgainLater
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.

data.name: Error404_Description
data.value: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

data.name: Home_HeroDescription
data.value: The community platform for our humans — sign up for shifts, join teams, register your camp, and help make things happen.

data.name: Home_ShiftsDescription
data.value: Browse open shifts, sign up for event roles, and track your schedule. See what's urgent and where help is needed most.

data.name: Home_TeamsDescription
data.value: Self-organizing working groups with coordinators, shared resources, and approval workflows. Find your crew.

data.name: Home_CampsDescription
data.value: Register your camp, discover neighbors by vibe or sound zone, and opt in each season. Find your spot on the map.

data.name: Home_TicketsDescription
data.value: Ticket sales integration, attendee matching, and discount campaigns — all linked to your profile.

data.name: Home_BudgetDescription
data.value: See how funds are allocated across departments. Open budget planning with public summaries everyone can review.

data.name: Home_ProfilesDescription
data.value: Rich profiles with burner names, locations, and emergency contacts. A birthday calendar and human directory for the community.

data.name: Home_Step2
data.value: Set up your profile — name, location, and how you'd like to be reached

data.name: Home_Step3
data.value: Agree to the basics — we handle the paperwork so you can focus on participating

data.name: Home_GettingStartedSummary
data.value: Takes a couple of minutes. After that, you're in — browse shifts, join teams, and start contributing.

data.name: Dashboard_PendingConsentsAlert
data.value: Action Required: You have {0} pending consent(s). Review and consent to maintain your active membership.

data.name: Dashboard_IncompleteProfileAlert
data.value: Complete Your Profile: Your profile is incomplete. Add your information to help us know you better.

data.name: Dashboard_ProfileIncomplete
data.value: Complete your profile to help us know you better.

data.name: Dashboard_ConsentsUpToDate
data.value: All consents are up to date.

data.name: Dashboard_NoConsentsRequired
data.value: No documents require consent at this time.

data.name: Dashboard_GovernanceDescription
data.value: Asociados are voting humans who participate in governance decisions like assemblies and elections. This is intended for community leaders and long-term committed humans.

data.name: Dashboard_GovernanceOptional
data.value: Governance participation is optional and doesn't affect your access to resources.

data.name: Dashboard_OnboardingDescription
data.value: Complete these steps to become a volunteer:

data.name: Dashboard_Step_Consents
data.value: Review and consent to required documents

data.name: Dashboard_Step_Approval
data.value: The board reviews and approves your account

data.name: Dashboard_Step_ConsentCheck
data.value: A coordinator reviews and clears your documents

data.name: Dashboard_TierApplicationPending
data.value: Your tier application is awaiting Board review.

data.name: Dashboard_RejectedMessage
data.value: Your signup has been reviewed and was not approved. If you have questions, please contact the admin team.

data.name: Dashboard_ShiftsDescription
data.value: See what needs doing and sign up.

data.name: Dashboard_TeamsDescription
data.value: Find your people. Or become someone else's people.

data.name: Dashboard_CampsDescription
data.value: The neighbourhoods that make Elsewhere feel like home.

data.name: Dashboard_YourStuffSubtitle
data.value: Profile, agreements, and the bits that are just yours.

data.name: Dashboard_ProfileCardDescription
data.value: Update your info, photo, and all that.

data.name: Dashboard_ConsentsCardDescription
data.value: The paperwork side of being a human.

data.name: Dashboard_PrivacyCardDescription
data.value: Control what others can see about you.

data.name: Dashboard_GovernanceCardDescription
data.value: Assemblies, elections, and the serious stuff.

data.name: Dashboard_TicketNotConfigured
data.value: Ticket info isn't available yet. Hang tight.

data.name: Dashboard_TicketMissingHint
data.value: We don't see one linked to your account.

data.name: Guest_Subtitle
data.value: Welcome to Humans — where Nobodies Collective manages everything for Elsewhere.

data.name: Guest_GetInvolvedTitle
data.value: Ready to stop being a ghost?

data.name: Guest_GetInvolvedDescription
data.value: Right now you exist… but no one can see you. Create your profile and suddenly:

data.name: Guest_GetInvolvedBullet3
data.value: People actually know who you are

data.name: Guest_BarriosDescription
data.value: The neighbourhoods people build and live in during the event

data.name: Guest_TeamsDescription
data.value: The crews that keep things running — sound, safety, builds, all of it

data.name: Guest_LegalDescription
data.value: Privacy policy, terms, consent docs — the boring but important stuff

data.name: Guest_AccountSubtitle
data.value: Even without a profile, you can manage your account and data.

data.name: Guest_CommsDescription
data.value: Choose which emails and notifications you get from us

data.name: Guest_DataDescription
data.value: Download everything we have on you — it's yours

data.name: Guest_DeleteDescription
data.value: Request full account deletion — 30 days to change your mind

data.name: Guest_TicketsConfirmed
data.value: You have a ticket for the event.

data.name: Guest_DeletionHeldUntil
data.value: We'll delete everything after {0} — waiting until after the event.

data.name: Profile_PendingConsents
data.value: You have {0} pending consent(s) to review.

data.name: Profile_PendingApprovalDescription
data.value: Your account is awaiting Board approval. Once approved, you'll be enrolled in the Volunteers team and receive access to organizational resources.

data.name: Profile_OnlyVisibleToYouAndBoard
data.value: only visible to you and board

data.name: Profile_NotificationTarget
data.value: System notifications are sent to this address

data.name: Profile_MotivationRequired
data.value: A motivation statement is required for Colaborador and Asociado applications.

data.name: ProfileEdit_TierDescription
data.value: Choose how you'd like to participate:

data.name: ProfileEdit_TierVolunteerDesc
data.value: You want to come to the event, contribute your energy, work a shift or join a team. No formal commitment to the association's governance. Most people fall here and that's completely valid.

data.name: ProfileEdit_TierColaboradorDesc
data.value: You want to get more involved: join working groups, attend General Assembly meetings, and be part of organisational conversations. You're not ready (or eligible) for voting rights yet, but you want a non-voting seat at the table.

data.name: ProfileEdit_TierAsociadoDesc
data.value: You've meaningfully led or contributed to an area of the event or community, you understand that this role is about making governance decisions on behalf of the whole community, and you're prepared to take that responsibility seriously. If you're not sure, collaborator is probably the better fit for now.

data.name: ProfileEdit_TierChangeNote
data.value: Note: You can always apply to change this later on.

data.name: ProfileEdit_TierLocked
data.value: Your tier is locked because you have an active or pending application.

data.name: ProfileEdit_ApplicationDescription
data.value: Tell us about your motivation. This will be reviewed by the Board alongside your profile.

data.name: ProfileEdit_MotivationPlaceholder
data.value: Why do you want to become a Colaborador/Asociado? What do you hope to contribute?

data.name: ProfileEdit_MotivationHelp
data.value: Minimum 50 characters. This helps the Board understand your goals.

data.name: Application_SignificantContribution
data.value: What has been your most significant contribution to Nowhere?

data.name: Application_SignificantContributionPlaceholder
data.value: If you can't think of any, but have significantly contributed to another Burn, tell us about that.

data.name: Application_SignificantContributionRequired
data.value: Please describe your most significant contribution for an Asociado application.

data.name: Application_RoleUnderstanding
data.value: In your own words, what do you understand the role of an associado to be, and why do you want that responsibility?

data.name: Application_RoleUnderstandingPlaceholder
data.value: Tell us what this role means to you and why you're ready for it.

data.name: Application_RoleUnderstandingRequired
data.value: Please describe your understanding of the asociado role.

data.name: ProfileEdit_BurnerNameHelp
data.value: This is your public display name, visible to everyone.

data.name: ProfileEdit_BurnerNameMatchesLegalName
data.value: Your burner name appears to match your legal name. Consider using a different name to protect your privacy — this name is visible to all humans.

data.name: ProfileEdit_LegalNameHelp
data.value: Required for official documents and signing.

data.name: ProfileEdit_CityHelp
data.value: Search for your city to set your location.

data.name: ProfileEdit_BioHelp
data.value: Tell us a bit about yourself.

data.name: ProfileEdit_LanguagesHelp
data.value: What languages do you speak? This helps coordinate across our multilingual community.

data.name: ProfileEdit_ContactInfoHelp
data.value: Add ways for other humans to reach you. Control who can see each piece of information.

data.name: ProfileEdit_BurnerCVHelp
data.value: Document your involvement in events, roles, and camps. Entries are sorted by date (newest first).

data.name: ProfileEdit_ManageEmailsHelp
data.value: Add email addresses, set notification preferences, and control profile visibility.

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_Lead
data.value: Manage your personal data and privacy settings.

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_ExportDescription
data.value: Download a copy of all your personal data in JSON format. This includes:

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_DeleteDescription
data.value: Request deletion of your account and personal data.

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_DeleteImmediateRevocation
data.value: Your team memberships, role assignments, and access to shared resources (Google Drive, Groups) will be revoked immediately

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_DeleteGracePeriod
data.value: A 30-day grace period allows you to cancel the request

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_DeleteAnonymized
data.value: After 30 days, your personal information will be anonymized and access permanently blocked

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_DeleteRetained
data.value: Anonymized records are retained for legal compliance and audit purposes but cannot be linked to your identity

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_DeletionScheduledFor
data.value: Your account is scheduled for deletion on {0}.

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_DeletionCancelInfo
data.value: You can cancel this request before the deletion date if you change your mind.

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_DPOContact
data.value: For questions about your data or privacy rights, contact our Data Protection Officer:

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_ConfirmDeletionQuestion
data.value: Are you sure you want to request deletion of your account?

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_DeletionAccessRevoked
data.value: Your team memberships and role assignments have been revoked.

data.name: ProfilePrivacy_CancelNoRestore
data.value: Cancelling will not restore your previous team memberships. You will need to rejoin teams.

data.name: Emails_Description
data.value: Manage your email addresses. Your sign-in email is always included. Add additional emails, set which one receives notifications, and control profile visibility.

data.name: Emails_MergeWarningBody
data.value: Account merge is for combining two accounts that belong to the same person (for example, an old email and a new email that are both yours). It is not a way to share or transfer tickets, bookings, or other items between two different people. Ticket transfer between humans is a separate feature, coming soon.

data.name: Emails_VerificationWillBeSent
data.value: A verification email will be sent to this address.

data.name: Emails_ResendCooldown
data.value: You can request a new verification email in {0} minute(s).

data.name: Emails_ManageEmailsHelp
data.value: Add additional email addresses, control notifications, and set profile visibility.

data.name: Emails_ManageLater
data.value: You can add and manage additional email addresses from your profile after completing setup.

data.name: Profile_AlreadySignInEmail
data.value: This is already your sign-in email. No need to set it as preferred.

data.name: Profile_VerificationCooldown
data.value: Please wait {0} minute(s) before requesting another verification email.

data.name: Profile_EmailInUse
data.value: This email address is already in use by another account.

data.name: Profile_VerificationSent
data.value: Verification email sent to {0}. Please check your inbox.

data.name: Profile_VerificationExpired
data.value: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Profile_EmailClaimed
data.value: This email address has been claimed by another account.

data.name: Profile_PreferredEmailCleared
data.value: Preferred email has been removed. System emails will now be sent to your sign-in email.

data.name: Profile_DeletionAlreadyPending
data.value: A deletion request is already pending.

data.name: Profile_DeletionRequested
data.value: Account deletion requested. Your account will be deleted on {0} unless you cancel.

data.name: Governance_AsociadoDescription
data.value: Asociados are the formal voting members of Nobodies Collective. As an asociado, you can attend general assemblies, vote on collective decisions, and participate in elections.

data.name: Governance_Optional
data.value: This is optional. Most humans don't need to become asociados. You already have access to resources once you've completed your profile and consents.

data.name: Governance_ColaboradorCanApply
data.value: Colaboradores may also apply for Asociado status if they wish to participate in governance.

data.name: Governance_UnderReviewMessage
data.value: Your application is being reviewed. We'll notify you by email once a decision is made.

data.name: Governance_ApprovedMessage
data.value: Welcome! You are now an asociado of Nobodies Collective.

data.name: Governance_ApprovedMessageColaborador
data.value: You are an approved Colaborador of Nobodies Collective.

data.name: Governance_ApprovedMessageAsociado
data.value: Welcome! You are now an Asociado of Nobodies Collective.

data.name: Governance_RejectedMessage
data.value: Your application was not approved. If you have questions, please contact the board.

data.name: Governance_AsociadoLawDescription
data.value: Asociados are the formal voting members of the association under Spanish law.

data.name: Governance_WhoShouldApplyDescription
data.value: Governance membership is intended for humans in leadership roles:

data.name: Governance_BoardReviews
data.value: The board reviews applications based on community involvement and alignment with the collective's mission.

data.name: Governance_NoteNotRequired
data.value: Note: You don't need to be an asociado to access resources or participate in events.

data.name: GovernanceCreate_Lead
data.value: Colaboradors and Asociados take on governance responsibilities. Choose the tier that best fits your involvement level.

data.name: GovernanceCreate_MotivationPlaceholder
data.value: Please share your motivation for joining...

data.name: GovernanceCreate_MotivationHelp
data.value: Minimum 50 characters. Tell us about yourself and why you want to be part of the collective.

data.name: GovernanceCreate_AdditionalInfoPlaceholder
data.value: Any additional information you'd like to share...

data.name: GovernanceCreate_AdditionalInfoHelp
data.value: Optional. Include any relevant skills, experience, or how you heard about us.

data.name: GovernanceCreate_ConfirmAccuracy
data.value: I confirm that all information provided in this application is accurate and truthful.

data.name: GovernanceCreate_Step1
data.value: Your application will be reviewed by the board

data.name: GovernanceCreate_Step2
data.value: The board considers community involvement and fit

data.name: GovernanceCreate_Step3
data.value: We may contact you for more information

data.name: GovernanceCreate_Step4
data.value: You'll receive an email once a decision is made

data.name: ApplicationDetail_WithdrawDescription
data.value: If you no longer wish to proceed with this application, you can withdraw it.

data.name: ApplicationDetail_WithdrawConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to withdraw this application?

data.name: Application_AlreadyPending
data.value: You already have a pending application.

data.name: Application_InvalidTier
data.value: Please select Colaborador or Asociado for your application.

data.name: Application_ConfirmAccuracy
data.value: You must confirm the accuracy of your information.

data.name: Application_Submitted
data.value: Your application has been submitted successfully!

data.name: Application_SubmitError
data.value: Something went wrong while submitting your application. Please try again.

data.name: Consent_NoDocumentsRequired
data.value: No documents require consent at this time.

data.name: Consent_PendingCount
data.value: {0} document(s) require your consent. Please review and consent to maintain your active membership.

data.name: Consent_AllConsented
data.value: You have consented to all required documents.

data.name: Consent_AboutDescription
data.value: By consenting to these documents, you agree to be bound by their terms. The Spanish version is the legally binding text. Translations are provided for convenience only.

data.name: ConsentReview_SpanishIsLegal
data.value: The Spanish version below is the legally binding text. The English translation is provided for your convenience only and is not legally binding.

data.name: ConsentReview_TranslationDisclaimer
data.value: This translation is provided for convenience only. The Spanish version is legally binding.

data.name: ConsentReview_ConsentCheckbox
data.value: I have read and understood this document, and I agree to be bound by its terms.

data.name: ConsentReview_SpanishLegalNote
data.value: I understand that the Spanish version is the legally binding text.

data.name: ConsentReview_CheckboxRequired
data.value: Please check this box to confirm you have read and agree to the terms.

data.name: Consent_MustCheck
data.value: You must check the consent checkbox to continue.

data.name: Consent_AlreadyConsented
data.value: You have already consented to this document.

data.name: Consent_SubmitError
data.value: Something went wrong while recording your consent. Please try again.

data.name: Consent_StubProfile_AddName
data.value: Add your legal name before signing consents.

data.name: Onboarding_NameRequiredBeforeShifts
data.value: Add your name first — we need it before you can sign up for shifts.

data.name: Teams_NoTeams
data.value: No teams have been created yet.

data.name: Teams_NotOnAnyTeam
data.value: You haven't joined any teams yet.

data.name: TeamDetail_SystemTeamInfo
data.value: This is a system-managed team. Membership is automatically synchronized based on {0} criteria.

data.name: TeamDetail_PendingApproval
data.value: Your join request is pending approval.

data.name: TeamDetail_SystemMembership
data.value: Membership in system teams is managed automatically.

data.name: MyTeams_NoTeams
data.value: You are not part of any teams yet.

data.name: JoinTeam_RequiresApproval
data.value: This team requires approval to join. Your request will be reviewed by the team leads or board members.

data.name: JoinTeam_MessagePlaceholder
data.value: Tell the team why you want to join...

data.name: JoinTeam_NoApprovalNeeded
data.value: You can join this team immediately without approval.

data.name: Team_AlreadyMember
data.value: You are already part of this team.

data.name: Team_AlreadyPendingRequest
data.value: You already have a pending request for this team.

data.name: Team_JoinRequestSubmitted
data.value: Your request to join has been submitted and is pending approval.

data.name: Team_Joined
data.value: You have successfully joined the team!

data.name: TeamAdmin_RequestApproved
data.value: Request approved. The human is now part of the team.

data.name: TeamAdmin_ProvideRejectionReason
data.value: Please provide a reason for rejection.

data.name: TeamAdmin_InvalidDriveUrl
data.value: Please enter a valid Google Drive folder URL.

data.name: TeamAdmin_InvalidGroupEmail
data.value: Please enter a valid Google Group email address.

data.name: Admin_CannotStartReview
data.value: Cannot start review. Application is not in Submitted state.

data.name: Admin_CannotApprove
data.value: Cannot approve. Application must be under review.

data.name: Admin_CannotReject
data.value: Cannot reject. Application must be under review.

data.name: Admin_ProvideRejectionReason
data.value: Please provide a reason for rejection.

data.name: Admin_CannotRequestInfo
data.value: Cannot request more info. Application must be under review.

data.name: Admin_SpecifyInfoNeeded
data.value: Please specify what information is needed.

data.name: Admin_MoreInfoRequested
data.value: More information has been requested from the applicant.

data.name: Admin_TeamCreateError
data.value: An error occurred while creating the team.

data.name: Admin_RoleAlreadyActive
data.value: User already has an active '{0}' role assignment.

data.name: Admin_RoleNotActive
data.value: This role assignment is not currently active.

data.name: Admin_GoogleSyncFailed
data.value: Sync failed. Check logs for details.

data.name: Email_ReConsentRequired_Subject_Multiple
data.value: Action Required: Multiple Legal Documents Updated

data.name: Email_ReConsentReminder_Subject
data.value: Reminder: {0} days to review updated documents

data.name: Email_AccessSuspended_Subject
data.value: Your Membership Access Has Been Suspended

data.name: MyTeams_LeaveConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to leave {0}?

data.name: MyTeams_WithdrawConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to withdraw this request?

data.name: TeamDetail_WithdrawConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to withdraw your request?

data.name: TeamDetail_LeaveConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to leave this team?

data.name: AdminHuman_AdminNotesGdprHint
data.value: This member can request to see these notes under GDPR.

data.name: AdminHuman_SuspendConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to suspend this human?

data.name: AdminTeams_RequireApprovalHelp
data.value: When enabled, new members must be approved by a team lead or board member.

data.name: AdminEditTeam_SystemTeamWarning
data.value: This is a system-managed team. Most settings cannot be modified.

data.name: AdminAddRole_CampAdminDesc
data.value: Manage camp map and placement phases

data.name: AdminAddRole_NoInfoAdminDesc
data.value: Approve shift signups, view volunteer medical data

data.name: GoogleAccounts_ResetPasswordConfirm
data.value: Reset password for {0}? A new temporary password will be generated and shown on screen. The human must change it at next sign-in.

data.name: TeamAdmin_SystemTeamRolesInfo
data.value: This is a system-managed team. Member roles cannot be changed manually.

data.name: TeamAdmin_RemoveConfirm
data.value: Remove this human from the team?

data.name: TeamAdmin_NoMembers
data.value: No humans in this team yet.

data.name: TeamAdmin_NoPendingRequests
data.value: No pending requests at this time.

data.name: TeamAdmin_ShareWithServiceAccount
data.value: To link a Google resource, you must first share it with the service account:

data.name: TeamAdmin_DriveFoldersHelp
data.value: Share the folder with this email as Editor

data.name: TeamAdmin_GoogleGroupsHelp
data.value: Add this email as a Manager of the group

data.name: TeamAdmin_UnlinkConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to unlink this resource?

data.name: TeamAdmin_NoResources
data.value: No resources linked to this team yet. Use the forms below to link a Google Drive folder or Google Group.

data.name: TeamAdmin_FolderUrlHelp
data.value: Paste the Google Drive folder URL. The folder must be shared with the service account.

data.name: TeamAdmin_GroupEmailHelp
data.value: Enter the Google Group email address. The service account must be a Manager of the group.

data.name: Profile_PictureInvalidFormat
data.value: Profile picture must be JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC format.

data.name: ProfileEdit_PictureHelp
data.value: Upload a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC image (max 20MB). Large images are automatically resized.

data.name: ProfileEdit_ImportGooglePhotoHelp
data.value: Copy the photo from your Google account as your profile picture. You can replace it later by uploading a new one.

data.name: Profile_ImportGooglePhoto_Success
data.value: Your Google photo has been imported as your profile picture.

data.name: Profile_ImportGooglePhoto_Unavailable
data.value: We can't import a Google photo — your account isn't linked to Google or no avatar was captured at sign-in.

data.name: Profile_ImportGooglePhoto_NoProfile
data.value: Finish setting up your profile first, then you can import your Google photo.

data.name: Profile_ImportGooglePhoto_AlreadyHasCustom
data.value: You already have a custom profile picture. Remove it first to import your Google photo.

data.name: Profile_ImportGooglePhoto_FetchFailed
data.value: We couldn't fetch your Google photo. Please try again later or upload one directly.

data.name: Profile_ImportGooglePhoto_InvalidFormat
data.value: Your Google photo couldn't be processed — unsupported format or bad response from Google.

data.name: Profile_ImportGooglePhoto_NotGoogleUrl
data.value: We couldn't import your Google photo — the stored avatar URL doesn't look like a Google address. Please upload one directly instead.

data.name: ProfileEdit_DateOfBirthHelp
data.value: Only month and day are stored — we don't collect birth year.

data.name: TeamDetail_NoPageContent
data.value: This team doesn't have a page yet. Add content to tell humans what you're about.

data.name: Teams_PublicDirectorySubtitle
data.value: Discover the teams that make things happen.

data.name: Teams_NoPublicTeams
data.value: No public team pages available yet.

data.name: ProfileEdit_EmergencyContactHelp
data.value: Provide a contact person for emergencies at events.

data.name: Profile_EmergencyContactBoardOnly
data.value: Only visible to you and the Board.

data.name: Birthdays_Privacy
data.value: Only humans who have set their birthday are shown.

data.name: Map_None
data.value: No humans have set their location yet.

data.name: Map_Privacy
data.value: Only humans who have set their location are shown. Location is approximate and based on city.

data.name: ProfileEdit_ContributorNote
data.value: May be considered for Colaborador or Asociado applications.

data.name: Profile_NoPriorBurnExperience
data.value: I have no prior burn experience

data.name: Profile_BurnerCVRequired
data.value: Please add at least one Burner CV entry or check the 'no prior burn experience' box.

data.name: ProfileEdit_ContributionInterestsHelp
data.value: Share your skills, interests, and how you'd like to get involved. Visible to all humans.

data.name: Validation_PhoneE164
data.value: {0} must start with + and country code (e.g. +34 612 345 678)

data.name: Validation_PhoneHint
data.value: Must start with + and country code (e.g. +34 612 345 678)

data.name: OnboardingReview_NoPending
data.value: No humans are waiting for review.

data.name: OnboardingReview_ClearHelp
data.value: Approves the profile review. Human joins Volunteers once legal documents are also signed.

data.name: OnboardingReview_ClearConfirm
data.value: This will clear the profile review for this human. Continue?

data.name: OnboardingReview_FlagConfirm
data.value: This will flag this human for further review. Continue?

data.name: OnboardingReview_AlreadyCleared
data.value: This human has already been cleared.

data.name: OnboardingReview_BulkClearedPartial
data.value: Approved {0} of {1} selected — the others are no longer eligible.

data.name: OnboardingReview_RejectConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to reject this human's signup? This cannot be undone.

data.name: OnboardingReview_RejectHelp
data.value: Rejecting will permanently deny this human's signup and send a notification email.

data.name: OnboardingReview_AlreadyRejected
data.value: This human has already been rejected.

data.name: OnboardingReview_DocsNote
data.value: Profile review can proceed independently. Human will join Volunteers once all documents are signed.

data.name: BoardVoting_NoApplications
data.value: No applications are pending board vote.

data.name: BoardVoting_ApproveConfirm
data.value: This will approve the application and grant the membership tier. Continue?

data.name: BoardVoting_RejectConfirm
data.value: This will reject the application. Continue?

data.name: BoardVoting_ApplicationNotVotable
data.value: This application is no longer open for voting.

data.name: BoardVoting_ApplicationNotVotable_WithStatus
data.value: This application cannot be voted on (current status: {0}).

data.name: BoardVoting_ConcurrencyConflict
data.value: This application was modified by another user. Please reload and try again.

data.name: BoardVoting_NoVotes
data.value: Cannot finalize: at least one board vote is required.

data.name: BoardVoting_MeetingDateRequired
data.value: Cannot finalize: a board meeting date is required.

data.name: Dashboard_TermExpiresSoon
data.value: Your membership term expires on {0}. Please submit a renewal application to continue.

data.name: Dashboard_TermExpired
data.value: Your membership term has expired. Submit a renewal application to restore your tier.

data.name: Email_TermRenewalReminder_Subject
data.value: Your {0} Membership Term Is Expiring Soon

data.name: Email_ApplicationSubmitted_Body
data.value:
New Membership Application

A new membership application has been submitted.

  • Applicant: {0}
  • Application ID: {1}

Review Application
data.comment: {0} = applicant name, {1} = application ID, {2} = base URL

data.name: Email_ApplicationApproved_Body
data.value:
Your Application Has Been Approved!

Dear {0},

We're delighted to inform you that your {1} application has been approved. Welcome to Humans!

You can now access your profile and explore teams:

  • View Your Profile
  • Browse Teams
  • Review Legal Documents

If you have any questions, don't hesitate to reach out.

Welcome aboard!
The Humans Team

data.name: Email_ApplicationRejected_Body
data.value:
Application Update

Dear {0},

Thank you for your interest in joining us. After careful review, we regret to inform you that we are unable to approve your {1} application at this time.

{2}

If you have any questions or would like to discuss this decision, please contact us at {3}.

Best regards,
The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = tier, {2} = reason HTML (or empty), {3} = admin email

data.name: Email_SignupRejected_Body
data.value:
Signup Update

Dear {0},

Thank you for your interest in joining us. After careful review, we regret to inform you that we are unable to approve your signup at this time.

{1}

If you have any questions or would like to discuss this decision, please contact us at {2}.

Best regards,
The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = reason HTML (or empty), {2} = admin email

data.name: Email_ReConsentsRequired_Body
data.value:
Legal Document Update

Dear {0},

We have updated the following required documents:

    {1}

As a human, you need to review and accept these updated documents to maintain your active status.

Review and Accept

If you have any questions about the changes, please contact us.

Thank you,
The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = document list items HTML, {2} = base URL

data.name: Email_ReConsentReminder_Body
data.value:
Consent Reminder

Dear {0},

This is a reminder that you have {1} days remaining to review and accept the following updated documents:

    {2}

If you do not accept these documents before the deadline, your access may be temporarily suspended.

Review Documents Now

Thank you,
The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = days remaining, {2} = document list items HTML, {3} = base URL

data.name: Email_Welcome_Body
data.value:
Welcome!

Dear {0},

Welcome to the Humans portal!

Here's what you can do:

  • Complete your profile
  • Join teams and working groups
  • Review legal documents

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us.

Best regards,
The Humans Team

data.name: Email_AccessSuspended_Body
data.value:
Access Suspended

Dear {0},

Your access has been temporarily suspended.

Reason: {1}

To restore your access, please take the required action:

  • Review pending consent requirements

If you believe this is an error or have questions, please contact us at {3}.

The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = reason, {2} = base URL, {3} = admin email

data.name: Email_EmailVerification_Body
data.value:
Email Verification

Dear {0},

You requested to add {1} to your account.

Please click the link below to verify this email address:

Verify Email Address

This link will expire in 24 hours.

If you did not request this change, you can safely ignore this email.

The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = email address, {2} = verification URL

data.name: Email_EmailVerification_Merge_Body
data.value:
Account Merge Verification

Dear {0},

You requested to add {1} to your account. This email address is currently linked to another account.

If you verify this email, a merge request will be submitted for admin review. Once approved, data from the other account will be merged into yours and the duplicate account will be archived.

Please click the link below to verify and request the merge:

Verify and Request Merge

This link will expire in 24 hours.

If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email. No changes will be made.

The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = email address, {2} = verification URL

data.name: Email_AccountDeletionRequested_Body
data.value:
Account Deletion Request Received

Dear {0},

We have received your request to delete your account. Your account and all associated data will be permanently deleted on {1}.

If you change your mind, you can cancel this request before the deletion date by visiting:

Cancel Deletion Request

After deletion, this action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently removed.

The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = formatted deletion date, {2} = base URL

data.name: Email_AccountDeleted_Body
data.value:
Account Deleted

Dear {0},

As requested, your Humans account has been permanently deleted. All your personal data has been removed from our systems.

Thank you for being part of our community. If you ever wish to rejoin, you're welcome to create a new account.

Best wishes,
The Humans Team

data.name: Email_AddedToTeam_Body
data.value:
Welcome to {1}!

Dear {0},

You have been added to the {1} team.

{2}

View Team Page

The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = team name, {2} = resources HTML (or empty), {3} = team URL

data.name: Email_TermRenewalReminder_Body
data.value:
Membership Term Renewal

Dear {0},

Your {1} term is expiring on {2}.

If you would like to continue as a {1}, please submit a renewal application before your term ends.

Submit Renewal Application

If you do not renew, you will remain an active human but will no longer have {1}-level access.

Thank you for your continued involvement!
The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = tier name, {2} = expiry date, {3} = base URL

data.name: Scanner_Index_Intro
data.value: In-browser scanner tools. No data is sent to the server — everything runs on your device.

data.name: Scanner_Barcode_CardBlurb
data.value: Decode QR codes and CODE128 barcodes using the device camera.

data.name: Scanner_Barcode_NotForCheckIn
data.value: This is a test tool — it is not used for check-in. Scanning a ticket here does not mark anyone as arrived.

data.name: Scanner_Barcode_Intro
data.value: Tap Scan to open the camera, point it at a barcode, and the decoded value will appear below. Nothing is saved.

data.name: Scanner_Barcode_DecodedHelp
data.value: Most recent on top. This list is kept in your browser only and cleared when you leave the page.

data.name: Scanner_Barcode_Error_Camera
data.value: Couldn't access the camera. Make sure you've granted permission and that this page is served over HTTPS.

data.name: Scanner_Barcode_Error_NoDecoder
data.value: Your browser doesn't have a built-in barcode decoder and the fallback library failed to load. Try a recent mobile Chrome or Safari.

data.name: Email_FacilitatedMessage_Body
data.value:
Message from {1}

Hi {0},

{1} has sent you a message through Humans:

{2}

{3}

data.name: Email_FacilitatedMessage_NoContactInfo
data.value: This human chose not to share their contact information.

data.name: SendMessage_IncludeContactInfoHelp
data.value: Your name and email will be included so they can reply to you directly.

data.name: SendMessage_Success
data.value: Your message has been sent to {0}.

data.name: Search_Placeholder
data.value: Search by name, city, interests, bio...

data.name: Search_NoResults
data.value: No humans found matching your search.

data.name: Search_MinChars
data.value: Enter at least 2 characters to search.

data.name: Camp_SwissCampLabel
data.value: Has this camp ever been called "Swiss Camp"

data.name: Camp_ContactLoginHint
data.value: Login required · Your email stays private

data.name: Camp_Contact_IncludeContactInfoHelp
data.value: Your email will be added as reply-to so they can respond directly

data.name: Camp_Contact_Success
data.value: Your message has been sent to {0}.

data.name: Camp_Contact_RateLimited
data.value: You've already contacted this barrio recently. Please wait a few minutes before sending another message.

data.name: Camp_Edit_WebsiteNudge
data.value: We strongly recommend adding a website for your barrio so visitors can learn more about you.

data.name: Email_FeedbackResponse_Body
data.value:
Update on Your Feedback

Dear {0},

We've reviewed your feedback:

{1}

Our response:

{2}

Thank you for helping us improve!

The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = original description, {2} = response message

data.name: Email_IssueComment_Body
data.value:
New comment on your issue

Hi {0},

There's a new comment on your issue:

Issue: {1}

Comment:

{2}

Open issue

— The Humans team
data.comment: {0} = display name, {1} = issue title, {2} = comment HTML, {3} = issue URL

data.name: Feedback_DescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Tell us what happened or what you'd like to see...

data.name: Feedback_Submitted
data.value: Thank you! Your feedback has been submitted.

data.name: Feedback_Error
data.value: Something went wrong submitting your feedback. Please try again.

data.name: Agent_ConversationRefusedLabel
data.value: The agent declined to answer this turn.

data.name: Agent_ContextCardCaveat
data.value: This is your current context. If your roles or teams have changed since this conversation, the agent saw a different version at the time.

data.name: Agent_ContextCardEmpty
data.value: No personal context is currently being sent to the agent.

data.name: Agent_ContextCardSummary
data.value: Your context (as the agent sees you now)

data.name: Agent_InputPlaceholder
data.value: Ask a question about how the system works…

data.name: Help_Agent_IssueProposed
data.value: I can't answer this myself. I've drafted an issue for the team — please review and submit it.

data.name: Email_MagicLinkLogin_Body
data.value:
Hi {0},

Click the link below to sign in:

Sign in to Nobodies

This link expires in 15 minutes and can only be used once.

If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.

data.name: Email_MagicLinkSignup_Subject
data.value: Welcome to Nobodies — confirm your email

data.name: Email_MagicLinkSignup_Body
data.value:
Welcome to Nobodies!

Click the link below to create your account:

Create your account

This link expires in 15 minutes and can only be used once.

If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.

data.name: MagicLinkSent_Message
data.value: We've sent a link to that email address from humans@nobodies.team. Check your inbox (and spam folder).

data.name: MagicLinkError_Message
data.value: This login link has expired or has already been used.

data.name: MagicLinkConfirm_Message
data.value: Click the button below to sign in to your account.

data.name: Email_WorkspaceCredentials_Body
data.value:
Your @nobodies.team account is ready

Hi {0},

Your Google Workspace account has been created:

Username: {1}
Temporary password: {2}

Sign in at mail.google.com and you will be asked to change your password on first login.

Our organization has two-factor authentication (2FA) enabled, so you will also need to set up a second factor (such as a phone or authenticator app) during sign-in.

The Humans team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = workspace email, {2} = temporary password

data.name: Todo_Profile_Pending
data.value: Add your information so the community can get to know you.

data.name: Todo_Consents_Done
data.value: All agreements are up to date.

data.name: Todo_ConsentCheck_Done
data.value: A coordinator has reviewed and cleared your documents.

data.name: Todo_ConsentCheck_Pending
data.value: A coordinator will review your documents once profile and agreements are complete.

data.name: Todo_ShiftInfo_Pending
data.value: Fill out your shift info so coordinators know your skills and preferences.

data.name: GetInvolved_Intro
data.value: The event runs on human power. Pick shifts that fit your schedule — every hour helps.

data.name: GetInvolved_Phase_Setup_Desc
data.value: Build the site before gates open. Physical work, flexible hours, great for meeting the crew.

data.name: GetInvolved_Phase_Event_Desc
data.value: Keep things running during the event. Bars, gates, safety, art — something for everyone.

data.name: GetInvolved_Phase_Strike_Desc
data.value: Take it all down and leave no trace. Satisfying work, usually shorter commitment.

data.name: CityPlanning_AddMyBarrioButton
data.value: Add my barrio on the map

data.name: CityPlanning_Admin_PlacementDatesHint
data.value: Informational only — shown in the help modal (Spain time). Does not automatically open or close placement.

data.name: CityPlanning_Admin_LimitZoneHint
data.value: Features may include an optional SoundZone property. Valid values: blue, green, yellow, orange, red, or two combined with an underscore (e.g. yellow_orange).

data.name: CityPlanning_Admin_OfficialZonesHint
data.value: Each feature's label is read from the Name property, if present.

data.name: CityPlanning_Admin_ExportDescription
data.value: Download all camp polygons for {0} as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection.

data.name: CityPlanning_Admin_ContainersDesc
data.value: Manage all containers — organisation-level and barrio containers.

data.name: CityPlanning_Admin_ImportDescription
data.value: Upload a GeoJSON FeatureCollection to bulk-update camp polygons for {0}. Features are matched by campName or campSlug property.

data.name: CityPlanning_Admin_ImportNotFeatureCollectionError
data.value: File must be a GeoJSON FeatureCollection.

data.name: CityPlanning_Admin_ImportFetchStateError
data.value: Could not load camp list. Please try again.

data.name: CityPlanning_Admin_ImportTokenMissingError
data.value: Security token missing. Please refresh the page.

data.name: CityPlanning_Admin_ImportPartialFailure
data.comment: {0} = success count, {1} = fail count, {2} = comma-separated camp names

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_WhenPlaceholder
data.value: The placement phase runs for a limited time — exact dates will be shown here soon. Place your barrio before it closes!

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_PlacingBody
data.value: Click {0} to start drawing. Then click on the map to drop points that define your space — each click adds a corner. Close the shape by clicking back on the first point.
data.comment: {0} = "Add my barrio on the map" button label in bold

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_Adjusting_VertexMove
data.value: Drag a corner point to move it

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_Adjusting_Reposition
data.value: Drag the whole shape to reposition it

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_Adjusting_AddVertex
data.value: Click the midpoint of an edge (where the length in metres is shown) to add a new corner

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_Adjusting_DeleteVertex
data.value: Click a point to select it (it turns orange), then press Delete or Backspace to remove it

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_Adjusting_MultiSelect
data.value: Hold Shift and click points to select multiple at once, or click and drag on empty space to draw a selection rectangle

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_Adjusting_Area
data.value: The area in m² is shown in the centre and updates as you edit

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_SavingBody
data.value: Happy with it? Hit Save. Afterwards, click your barrio on the map to see its size, then Edit to jump back into edit mode. Every save creates a history entry — use the History button to browse and restore any previous version: hit the preview button to show the version, and then save the one you want to restore. No stress, you can't break anything!

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_ZonesBody
data.value: The dashed areas mark the safe camping zones, protected by lightning poles. The colour of the dashes indicates the zone's sound level — from blue (quieter) to red (louder). Camping outside them is not allowed, so keep your barrio inside those boundaries.

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_OverlapsBody
data.value: If your barrio overlaps with another, reach out on {0} and work it out together. If there are unresolved conflicts at the end of the phase, the city planning team will sort them out.

data.name: CityPlanning_Help_ColorsBody
data.value: Each barrio is coloured by its preferred sound zone (editable from your barrio page).

data.name: Container_PlacementClosed
data.value: Container placement is currently closed. You can manage containers you own, but not yet place them on the map.

data.name: Container_Empty
data.value: No containers registered for this season yet.

data.name: Container_FieldMainImage
data.value: Main image (JPEG, PNG, or WebP — max 10 MB)

data.name: Container_FieldPlacementImage
data.value: Placement sketch (JPEG, PNG, or WebP — max 10 MB)

data.name: ContainerMap_ConfirmClear
data.value: Remove placement for «{0}»? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Feedback_SelectReport
data.value: Select a report to view details

data.name: Unsub_ConfirmMessage
data.value: If you confirm, you will no longer receive {0} emails from Humans.

data.name: Unsub_DoneMessage
data.value: You will no longer receive {0} emails from Humans.

data.name: Unsub_DoneManage
data.value: You can manage all your communication preferences from your

data.name: Unsub_ExpiredMessage
data.value: Please use the link from a more recent email, or

data.name: Unsub_ExpiredSignIn
data.value: sign in to manage your communication preferences

data.name: CommPrefs_Description
data.value: Choose which communications you receive and how.

data.name: CommPrefs_OneClick_Prompt
data.value: You clicked an unsubscribe link from {0} emails.

data.name: CommPrefs_OneClick_Hint
data.value: One-click unsubscribe, or fine-tune the matrix below.

data.name: CommPrefs_OneClick_Done
data.value: Unsubscribed. You can re-enable any category below.

data.name: Emails_ConfirmRemove
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this email?

data.name: Emails_GoogleDescription
data.value: This email is used for Google Groups and Shared Drive access.

data.name: Emails_GoogleRejected
data.value: Google sync failed. The current email was rejected by Google. Select a different email below to retry sync.

data.name: Emails_GoogleValid
data.value: Google sync is working with the current email.

data.name: ShiftInfo_SkillsSubtitle
data.value: Select skills you'd like to use. You can change these anytime.

data.name: ShiftInfo_WorkStyleTitle
data.value: How do you like to work?

data.name: ShiftInfo_WorkStyleSubtitle
data.value: Help coordinators match you with shifts that fit your style and availability.

data.name: ShiftInfo_LanguagesSubtitle
data.value: This helps us match you with teams where you can communicate well.

data.name: ShiftInfo_OtherSkills
data.value: What other skills do you have?

data.name: ShiftInfo_WorkTime
data.value: When do you prefer to work?

data.name: ShiftInfo_OtherLanguages
data.value: What other languages do you speak?

data.name: Shifts_PieCoverage_RowAria
data.value: Department coverage pies — click a pie to filter the page

data.name: Shifts_PieCoverage_TipFilter
data.value: Tip — click a chart to filter to that department; click it again to clear.

data.name: Shifts_PreferencesHelp
data.value: Select tags that match the kind of work you enjoy. Matching shifts will be highlighted with a star.

data.name: Shifts_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Browse volunteer options, filter by phase or department, and sign up for the shifts that suit you best.

data.name: Shifts_NotOpenYet
data.value: Shifts aren't open yet. Only coordinators and admins can see this page.

data.name: Shifts_SortUrgencyHint
data.value: Show shifts that need people the most, first

data.name: Shifts_BrowsingClosed
data.value: Shift browsing is not yet open. Check back later!

data.name: Shifts_NoActiveEvent
data.value: No active event is configured. An admin needs to set up event settings first.

data.name: Shifts_BailConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to bail?

data.name: Shifts_AvailabilityHelp
data.value: Mark which days you're available to help. Coordinators can see who's in the pool when assigning shifts.

data.name: Shifts_SlotsFull
data.value: Some days still need help but all available slots are currently full. Check back later in case spots open up.

data.name: Shifts_ConfirmSignup_ArriveBy
data.value: You'll be expected on site by {0}.

data.name: Shifts_ConfirmSignup_Prompt
data.value: Is this the period you intended to sign up for?

data.name: Shifts_ConfirmSignup_Conflicts_Heading
data.value: Some days in this range conflict with shifts you're already signed up for:

data.name: Shifts_ConfirmSignup_Conflicts_PartialNote
data.value: You're already signed up on a few of these days, so we'll only add the ones that are free.

data.name: Shifts_ConfirmSignup_Conflicts_AllBlocked
data.value: Looks like you already have a shift booked on every day in this range, so we can't add any of these.

data.name: ShiftDash_NoShiftsMatch
data.value: No shifts match the current filters.

data.name: Privacy_Lead
data.value: Humans manages membership for Nobodies Collective and processes personal data in accordance with GDPR and Spanish data protection law (LOPDGDD).

data.name: Privacy_DataControllerBody
data.value: A Spanish nonprofit association registered in Andalucia.

data.name: Privacy_DataControllerDPO
data.value: For data protection inquiries, contact our Data Protection Officer at:

data.name: Privacy_DataWeCollectIntro
data.value: We collect and process the following categories of personal data:

data.name: Privacy_Collect_Identity
data.value: Name, email address (from Google authentication), display name/burner name

data.name: Privacy_Collect_Technical
data.value: IP address and user agent (for consent records)

data.name: Privacy_Collect_Consent
data.value: Records of your agreement to legal documents

data.name: Privacy_LegalBasisIntro
data.value: We process your data based on:

data.name: Privacy_Legal_Consent
data.value: For optional data you choose to provide

data.name: Privacy_Use_Membership
data.value: To manage your membership and team participation

data.name: Privacy_Use_Communicate
data.value: To communicate with you about organizational activities

data.name: Privacy_Use_Connections
data.value: To facilitate connections between humans (based on your visibility settings)

data.name: Privacy_DataRetentionIntro
data.value: We retain your data according to the following policies:

data.name: Privacy_Retention_Active
data.value: Data retained while your account is active

data.name: Privacy_Retention_Inactive
data.value: Data retained for up to 7 years for legal compliance

data.name: Privacy_Retention_Consent
data.value: Retained indefinitely as required for GDPR compliance

data.name: Privacy_YourRightsIntro
data.value: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:

data.name: Privacy_Rights_Access
data.value: Request a copy of your personal data

data.name: Privacy_Rights_Erasure
data.value: Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")

data.name: Privacy_Rights_Portability
data.value: Receive your data in a machine-readable format

data.name: Privacy_Rights_Objection
data.value: Object to certain types of processing

data.name: Privacy_YourRightsExercise
data.value: To exercise these rights, visit your {0} settings or contact us at {1}.

data.name: Privacy_CookiesIntro
data.value: This site uses only essential cookies required for:

data.name: Privacy_CookiesNoTracking
data.value: We do not use analytics, advertising, or third-party tracking cookies.

data.name: Privacy_DataSecurityIntro
data.value: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data, including:

data.name: Privacy_ThirdPartyIntro
data.value: We use the following third-party services:

data.name: Privacy_ThirdParty_GoogleWorkspace
data.value: For team resource provisioning (shared drives, groups)

data.name: Privacy_ChangesBody
data.value: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify active humans of significant changes via email.

data.name: Privacy_ContactBody
data.value: For questions or concerns about this policy, contact our Data Protection Officer at {0}.

data.name: Privacy_ComplaintBody
data.value: If you are not satisfied with our response, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) at {0}.

data.name: ShiftDash_Departments_SortNote
data.value: sorted by lowest slot fill % first

data.name: ShiftDash_Countdown_Label
data.value: Countdown to feet on the ground

data.name: ShiftDash_Countdown_InProgress
data.value: Event in progress — day {0} since build started

data.name: ShiftDash_DeptStaffingByDay_Subtitle
data.value: stacked by department — confirmed signups only

data.name: ShiftDash_DurationMix_Subtitle
data.value: how shifts are split between full-day and hourly, for this period

data.name: ShiftDash_Heatmap_Subtitle
data.value: slot fill per rota per day — green = 80%+, yellow = 60–79%, red = below, grey = no shift that day

data.name: ShiftDash_Heatmap_Legend
data.value: Hover a cell for details. Scroll horizontally to see all days.

data.name: ShiftDash_Coordinators_Subtitle
data.value: teams with pending signups, oldest login first

data.name: ShiftDash_Coordinators_DirectPending
data.comment: {0} = pending count at this team level only

data.name: ShiftDash_Trends_DAUNote
data.value: Only last login per human is stored — older buckets undercount.

data.name: EmailGrid_GoogleColumnTooltip
data.value: Email used for Google Workspace sync.

data.name: EmailGrid_WorkspaceLockedHelp
data.value: Primary and Google are managed by Google Workspace while your @nobodies.team address is present.

data.name: EmailGrid_VerificationPendingBody
data.value: Check your inbox for the verification email and click the link to confirm your address.

data.name: EmailGrid_LinkGoogleHelp
data.value: Sign in with Google to attach an additional Google account to your profile.

data.name: EmailGrid_SetGoogleRejected
data.value: Could not set Google service email — the row is unknown or not verified.

data.name: EmailGrid_UnlinkRejected
data.value: Could not unlink — the row is unknown or has no sign-in provider.

data.name: EmailGrid_GoogleServiceUpdated
data.value: Google service email updated. Sync will be retried with the new email.

data.name: EmailGrid_GoogleFlagCleared
data.value: Google identity flag cleared from that row.

data.name: EmailGrid_ClearGoogleRejected
data.value: Could not clear Google flag — the row is unknown or not currently flagged.

data.name: EmailGrid_PrimaryFlagCleared
data.value: Primary flag cleared from that row.

data.name: EmailGrid_ClearPrimaryRejected
data.value: Could not clear primary flag — the row is unknown or not currently flagged.

data.name: EmailGrid_ConfirmClearGoogle
data.value: Clear the Google identity flag from this email row?

data.name: EmailGrid_ConfirmClearPrimary
data.value: Clear the primary flag from this email row?

data.name: EmailGrid_DeleteRejectedHasProvider
data.value: This email is linked to a sign-in provider. Use Unlink instead.

data.name: EmailGrid_AdminAddSentVerification
data.value: Verification email sent to the user.

data.name: EmailGrid_ConfirmAdminVerify
data.value: Manually mark this email verified without the user clicking the link?

data.name: EmailGrid_AdminVerifyMergeRequested
data.value: This address is already verified on another account. A merge request was created instead of verifying.

data.name: EmailGrid_LinkFailed
data.value: We couldn't link this Google account. Please try again.

data.name: LinkedAccounts_Description
data.value: OAuth providers currently linked to your account. You can use any of these to sign in.

data.name: LinkedAccounts_ConfirmUnlink
data.value: Unlink this account? You'll no longer be able to sign in with it.

data.name: LinkedAccounts_UnlinkBlockedLastSignInMethod
data.value: Cannot unlink — this is your only remaining sign-in method.

data.name: Issue_NoneFound
data.value: No issues match the current filters.

data.name: Issue_SelectOne
data.value: Select an issue from the list to view details.

data.name: Issue_ReopenByCommenting
data.value: Posting a comment will reopen this issue.

data.name: Issue_Area_Hint
data.value: Leave blank to auto-detect from the current page.

data.name: Issue_Description_Placeholder
data.value: What happened? What did you expect?

data.name: Issue_Widget_ToastSuccess
data.value: Thanks! Issue logged. View it here: {0}
data.comment: {0} = absolute URL path of the new issue

data.name: Issue_Widget_ToastValidationFailed
data.value: Could not file the issue. Please check the required fields and try again.

data.name: Issue_Widget_ToastNetworkError
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again.

data.name: Issue_Tips_Bullet1
data.value: Describe what you were trying to do.

data.name: Issue_Tips_Bullet2
data.value: Describe what happened, and what you expected.

data.name: Issue_Tips_Bullet3
data.value: Include a screenshot if it helps explain.

data.name: Issue_Tips_Bullet4
data.value: One issue per report — separate problems should be separate issues.

data.name: Issue_NotEmail_Notice
data.value: This isn't email — replies happen here, in the conversation thread on the issue.

data.name: Issue_Error
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again.

data.name: Welcome_Subtitle
data.value: Your ticket for Elsewhere 2026 is confirmed.

data.name: Welcome_ShiftsTitle
data.value: Now let's make this thing happen together.

data.name: Welcome_ShiftsBody
data.value: Elsewhere isn't a festival you show up to — it's one you help build. Every human picks shifts: setting up before, keeping things running during, and taking it all down after.

data.name: Welcome_ShiftsBody2
data.value: To browse and sign up for shifts, you need a Humans account. It takes a couple of minutes.

data.name: Welcome_Footer
data.value: Already have an account? Same button — sign in and you'll land straight on the shifts page.

data.name: Email_GoogleGroupRemoval_LossOfAccess_Subject
data.value: You have been removed from the group {0}

data.name: Email_GoogleGroupRemoval_LossOfAccess_Body
data.value:
Group access removed

Hi {0},

Your access to the Google Group {1} ({2}) has been removed.

This was an automatic action based on your current team and role assignments at Nobodies. You will no longer receive messages sent to this group.

If you believe this was done in error, please contact your team coordinator.

The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = group display name, {2} = group email

data.name: Email_GoogleDriveRemoval_LossOfAccess_Subject
data.value: Your access to {0} has been removed

data.name: Email_GoogleDriveRemoval_LossOfAccess_Body
data.value:
Drive access removed

Hi {0},

Your access to the shared folder {1} has been removed.

This was an automatic action based on your current team and role assignments at Nobodies.

If you believe this was done in error, please contact your team coordinator.

The Humans Team

data.name: Email_GoogleAccessRemoval_SecondaryCleanup_Subject
data.value: {0} no longer has Nobodies group access

data.name: Email_GoogleAccessRemoval_SecondaryCleanup_Body
data.value:
Secondary email tidied up

Hi {0},

The address {1} has been removed from Nobodies groups and shared folders.

Your primary Nobodies email is now {2}, and your access to groups and shared folders through that address is unchanged. This message is just so you have a record of which address was tidied up.

If you believe {1} should still have had access, please contact your team coordinator.

The Humans Team
data.comment: {0} = user name, {1} = removed email, {2} = current Google email

data.name: OnboardingBanner_Text
data.value: Finish setting up your account to access shifts and team features.

data.name: VolTrack_Filter_HideCampSetup
data.value: Hide volunteers with a camp set-up date

data.name: VolTrack_Search_Placeholder
data.value: Search by name or playa name…

data.name: VolTrack_Unbooked_Subtitle
data.value: Volunteers who said they're attending and have availability filled in but haven't signed up for any shifts.

data.name: VolTrack_Popover_DayOffBlockedBySignups
data.value: Bail this signup before marking a day off

data.name: VolTrack_Err_DayOffWithSignups
data.value: Volunteer has signups on that day — bail them first.

data.name: VolTrack_Err_DayOffOutsideBuild
data.value: Day off must be inside the build period.

data.name: VolTrack_Popover_MarkCampSetup
data.value: Mark went to camp set-up from this day

data.name: VolTrack_Popover_MoveCampSetup
data.value: Move camp set-up to this day

data.name: VolTrack_Legend_Gap
data.value: No coverage on a day they should have been here

data.name: VolTrack_Err_Unknown
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again.

data.name: VolTrack_Err_SetupAtOrAfterGateOpen
data.value: Set-up date must be inside the build period (before gate-open day).

data.name: VolTrack_Err_SetupBeforeFirstSignup
data.value: Set-up date must be on or after the volunteer's first build signup.

data.name: ShiftDash_VolTrackEntry_Subtitle
data.value: Identify gaps, mark camp set-up dates, surface declared-but-unbooked volunteers.

data.name: Email_CoordinatorRotaMessage_Subject
data.value: A message about your shifts on {0}

data.name: Email_CoordinatorRotaMessage_Body
data.value:
Dear {0},

A message from the coordinator of {2}:

{3}

FYI, your shifts on this rota are:

{4}

Thank you,

{5}
data.comment: {0}=recipient name, {1}=sender name, {2}=rota name, {3}=message body, {4}=shift list HTML, {5}=sender contact block HTML

data.name: EmailRota_NoRecipients
data.value: No one is signed up to this rota yet.

data.name: EmailRota_MessageHelp
data.value: Plain text only. Each recipient will see this body plus their own shift list on this rota.

data.name: EmailRota_Success
data.value: Queued {0} email(s) to recipients on rota '{1}'.

data.name: EmailRota_NoActiveSignups
data.value: This rota has no active signups to email.
